ideas.name: 智能行程规划

技术：Python + 地图API + 优化算法
ideas.detail_en:
Approach: Preference input + attraction data + route optimization
Use cases: Solo travel, family trip, honeymoon
Tech: Python + Map API + Optimization algorithm
